action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline 3-epoch ConvNeXt-Tiny achieved 0.7743 test accuracy. Pipeline works. Each epoch ~25s for ConvNeXt-Tiny at 160px. Analysis: With 40% noise, key is noise-robust training. Strategies: (1) use stronger CLIP ViT-B/16 backbone, (2) noise-robust loss like GCE or symmetric CE, (3) early stopping prevents memorizing noisy labels, (4) more epochs with cosine schedule, (5) MixUp helps regularization. Test val is noisy too so val_acc capped ~0.6, but true accuracy 0.77+. Decision: Switch to CLIP ViT-B/16 (stronger pretrained features), use GCE loss (robust to noise), train ~8 epochs at 224px. Estimate: ViT-B/16 at 224 ~60s/epoch -> ~8min total.
